name: Apple Calendar
description: Bundled Apple Calendar tools for reading and editing local macOS calendars.

tools.name: getCalendarEvents
tools.description: Get events from a specific Apple calendar.

tools.name: createCalendarEvent
tools.description: Create a new event in an Apple calendar.

tools.name: updateCalendarEvent
tools.description: Update an existing event in an Apple calendar.

tools.name: deleteCalendarEvent
tools.description: Delete an event from an Apple calendar.

author: orbyt
